name: AlternativeTo
description: Crowd-sourced software recommendation site where users find alternatives to apps they know; you add your app and specify which popular apps it is an alternative to, giving long-term, search-driven discoverability.

auth.notes: Free community account (email/password, social sign-in available) to add an app. Submissions are community-moderated, so listings must read as neutral and factual to be approved.

best_practices: AlternativeTo is an encyclopedia, not a launch board: write in a neutral, factual tone and avoid marketing hype or it may be rejected.
List the right popular apps your product is an alternative to; choosing accurate, well-known alternatives is what makes you discoverable on their pages.
Select every platform you genuinely support (Web, Mac, Windows, Linux, iOS, Android), since users filter heavily by platform.
Pick the correct license/pricing model (Free, Freemium, Open Source, Commercial) so your app shows up in the right filtered lists.
Choose precise categories and feature tags so the recommendation engine matches you to the right comparisons.
Add a clear icon and a couple of screenshots; community-curated listings with complete media gain trust and upvotes.
After it goes live, encourage genuine users to 'like' your app against the relevant alternatives to climb the rankings.

questions.label: Short description / tagline
questions.help: One neutral, factual line describing what the app is.

questions.label: Description
questions.help: Encyclopedic, neutral explanation of the app's purpose and capabilities.

questions.label: Alternative to (similar apps)
questions.help: List the popular apps your app is an alternative to; this is what makes it discoverable.

questions.label: Platforms
questions.help: Select every platform the app genuinely runs on.

questions.label: Screenshots
questions.help: Images of the app to add credibility to the listing.
